description_long: This object is a weathered, diamond-shaped metal sign mounted on a rusted vertical pole. The main sign face is orange with black, bold uppercase text reading 'END', and it shows significant signs of rust, dirt, and aging. Below the main sign, a smaller rectangular sign is attached, reading 'WARNING AREA 51 RESTRICTED AREA' in black and red text on a yellow background, also appearing aged and corroded. The rear of the signs reveals a metallic, unpainted surface with visible seams and rust patches. The pole is metallic and shows extensive rust, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The overall construction appears sturdy, with both signs firmly affixed to the pole.
description: A weathered orange 'END' sign with a smaller 'WARNING AREA 51' sign below, both mounted on a rusted metal pole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange 'END' sign and the yellow 'WARNING AREA 51' sign clearly, both with visible weathering.
description_view_1: Side profile view, revealing the thinness of the signs and pole, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the unpainted, metallic backs of both signs and the rusted pole, with visible seams and corrosion.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thinness of the structure with little surface detail.
